nasb.text: It is like the dew of Hermon Coming down upon the mountains of Zion; For there the Lord commanded the blessing—life forever.

esv.text: It is like the dew of Hermon, which falls on the mountains of Zion! For there the Lord  has commanded the blessing, life forevermore.

cnv.text: 又好比黑門的甘露 落在錫安的眾山上， 在那裡有耶和華命定的福， 就是永遠的生命。

ccb.text: 又像黑门的甘露降在锡安山上。 那里有耶和华所赐的福气， 就是永远的生命。

csbs.text: 又像黑门的甘露降在锡安的众山上， 因为在那里，耶和华命定了祝福， 就是永远的生命。
